title: Subject Verb Agreement (SVA)
subtitle: SSC CGL Tier 1 + Tier 2 Complete Notes

definition.english: Subject Verb Agreement means the verb must agree with the subject in number and person.
definition.marathi: Subject आणि Verb यांच्यात Number (Singular/Plural) आणि Person चा मेळ असणे म्हणजे Subject Verb Agreement.

rules.title: AND Rule
rules.marathi: दोन Singular Subjects AND ने जोडले असतील तर Verb Plural येतो.
examples: Ram and Shyam are friends.
Mohan and Sohan have arrived.

rules.title: Same Person / Same Thing
rules.marathi: दोन Nouns एकाच व्यक्ती किंवा वस्तूसाठी वापरले असतील तर Singular Verb.
examples: The Secretary and Principal is coming.
The poet and philosopher was honored.

rules.title: Each / Every + And
rules.marathi: Each किंवा Every असल्यास Singular Verb.
examples: Every boy and girl was present.
Each man and woman was invited.

wrongRight.wrong: Every boy and girl were present.
wrongRight.right: Every boy and girl was present.

rules.title: Each / Either / Neither
rules.marathi: Each, Either, Neither नेहमी Singular Verb घेतात.
examples: Each of the boys is present.
Either of the roads leads to Pune.
Neither of the girls has arrived.

rules.title: Either...Or / Neither...Nor
examples: Either Ram or his friends are coming.
Either the boys or Ram is coming.
Neither Ram nor his friends are ready.
Neither the boys nor Ram is ready.

rules.title: Not Only...But Also
examples: Not only Ram but also his friends are present.
Not only the boys but also Ram is present.

rules.title: Along With / As Well As
examples: Ram along with his friends is coming.
The teacher as well as students was present.

rules.title: Many A / More Than One
examples: Many a man has failed.
More than one student has passed.

rules.title: A Number Of / The Number Of
examples: A number of students are absent.
The number of students is increasing.

rules.title: One Of
rules.marathi: One Of + Plural Noun + Singular Verb
examples: One of the boys is absent.
One of the books was lost.

rules.title: All / Some / Most / Half
examples: All the milk is spoiled.
All the students are present.
Half of the money is spent.
Half of the students are absent.

rules.title: Collective Nouns
rules.marathi: Group म्हणून वापरल्यास Singular, Members वेगळे असल्यास Plural.
examples: The committee has taken its decision.
The team is winning.
The committee are divided.

rules.title: News / Physics / Mathematics
rules.marathi: Plural दिसतात पण Singular Verb घेतात.
examples: News is important.
Physics is difficult.
Mathematics is my favorite subject.

rules.title: Distance / Time / Money
examples: Ten kilometers is a long distance.
Ten years is a long time.
Five hundred rupees is enough.

rules.title: There / Here
examples: There is a book on the table.
There are books on the table.
Here comes the bus.

rules.title: Titles of Books / Movies
examples: The Ramayana is a great epic.
Gulliver's Travels is a famous book.

rules.title: Pair Nouns
rules.marathi: Scissors, Trousers, Spectacles हे Plural Verb घेतात.
examples: My scissors are sharp.
His trousers are expensive.
These spectacles are new.

pyqTraps.wrong: Every boy and girl were present.
pyqTraps.right: Every boy and girl was present.

pyqTraps.wrong: Neither of the girls have arrived.
pyqTraps.right: Neither of the girls has arrived.

pyqTraps.wrong: Ram along with his friends are coming.
pyqTraps.right: Ram along with his friends is coming.

pyqTraps.wrong: More than one students have passed.
pyqTraps.right: More than one student has passed.

pyqTraps.wrong: The number of students are increasing.
pyqTraps.right: The number of students is increasing.

pyqTraps.wrong: One of the boys are absent.
pyqTraps.right: One of the boys is absent.

examStrategy.label: Tier-1
examStrategy.text: Golden Revision + PYQ Traps revise करा.

examStrategy.label: Tier-2
examStrategy.text: Advanced Error Detection आणि PYQs सोडवा.

finalVerdict: हे Notes SSC CGL Tier-1 + Tier-2 साठी Subject Verb Agreement chapter जवळपास 95-100% cover करतात. 🚀📚
